questions.question: What is the primary function of the general register stack organization?
keyPoints: Between different parts of the system

questions.question: What is the main advantage of using a stack organization?
What is the difference between a register and a memory location?
keyPoints: Register: Small, high-speed memory location within CPU
Memory: Larger, slower memory location outside CPU

questions.question: What is the purpose of the stack pointer?
keyPoints: Points to top element of stack

questions.question: What is the difference between a push and a pop operation?
keyPoints: Push: Add element to top of stack
Pop: Remove element from top of stack

questions.question: Explain the concept of a stack frame and its purpose in the general register stack organization.
keyPoints: Used for function or procedure calls

questions.question: Compare and contrast the general register stack organization with other memory management techniques.
Describe the role of the instruction pointer in the general register stack organization.
